coverage.pdf_extensions_module: 100% (all exported symbols covered: PDF_EXTENSIONS, PDF_MAX_SIZE_BYTES, PDF_MAGIC_BYTES, PDF_IFRAME_SANDBOX, PDF_MIME_TYPE, isPdfExtension, validatePdfMagicBytes, validatePdfContent)
coverage.pdf_preview_component: iframe/sandbox/title attrs, createObjectURL/revokeObjectURL lifecycle, filePath change, fetch failure fallback, loading state - all branches covered
coverage.api_route_pdf_branch: success / size exceeded (413) / invalid magic bytes (400) / ENOENT (404) / WORKTREE_NOT_FOUND (404) / non-PDF routing
coverage.file_panel_content_branch: isPdf branch exclusivity with image/video/html viewers

tdd_phases.red: Created failing tests first for pdf-extensions, API branch, and PdfPreview component
tdd_phases.green: Implemented minimal code to satisfy each test suite
tdd_phases.refactor: Extracted helper fixtures to tests/helpers/pdf-fixtures.ts; consolidated normalizeExtension helper; followed existing image/video/html patterns for consistency

acceptance_criteria.magic_bytes_validation: satisfied (validatePdfMagicBytes rejects non-PDF bytes; API returns INVALID_MAGIC_BYTES)
acceptance_criteria.pdf_size_exceeded_error: satisfied (20MB threshold via PDF_MAX_SIZE_BYTES; API returns PDF_SIZE_EXCEEDED with 413)
acceptance_criteria.csp_frame_src_blob: satisfied (next.config.js updated with 'frame-src self blob:' and DR4-007 retraction comment)

notes: TDD Red->Green->Refactor cycle completed for each task. All 52 newly-added/modified tests pass along with the full 6381-test suite. Implementation follows existing image/video/html patterns: API route returns Base64 data URI with isPdf flag; PdfPreview converts data URI to Blob URL at render time and loads it into a sandboxed iframe; CSP frame-src updated to allow blob:; content polling disabled for PDF tabs to avoid re-fetching large Base64 payloads. CLAUDE.md module reference updated with pdf-extensions.ts and PdfPreview.tsx entries.
